/usr/bin/ar qc liblunara.a CMakeFiles/lunara.dir/src/util/log.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lunara.dir/src/util/timer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lunara.dir/src/runtime/tensor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lunara.dir/src/runtime/cpu_ref.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lunara.dir/src/runtime/interpreter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lunara.dir/src/passes/shape_infer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lunara.dir/src/passes/const_fold.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lunara.dir/src/lunara/ir/graph.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lunara.dir/src/lunara/ir/verifier.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lunara.dir/src/lunara/ir/printer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lunara.dir/src/lunara/frontend/json/graph_json_io.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lunara.dir/src/passes/pass_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lunara.dir/src/runtime/cuda/cuda_context.cu.o CMakeFiles/lunara.dir/src/runtime/cuda/cuda_util.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lunara.dir/src/runtime/cuda/nvrtc_compiler.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib liblunara.a
